chunks.title: Introduction to the Lament
chunks.reason: The prophet receives the command and begins addressing Tyre directly.

chunks.title: Description of Tyre's Glory and Trade
chunks.reason: A detailed catalog of the city's construction materials, military allies, and trading partners.

chunks.title: The Sinking of Tyre
chunks.reason: A description of the shipwreck and the immediate aftermath of the city's destruction.

chunks.title: The Reaction of the Nations
chunks.reason: The final response of the coastlands and merchants to Tyre's fall.
